headline: UBER Expands Its Food Delivery Business: Is it a Growth Catalyst?
summary: UBER is expanding Uber Eats with new retailers, pushing beyond food delivery into everyday needs, from skincare and shipping to pet supplies.

headline: 4 'Safer' Dividend Buys Out Of Barron's 23 June Better Bets Than T-Bills
summary: Long-term bond yields persist. But investors looking for income can still find plenty of attractive opportunities with dividend-paying stocks that have healthy yields. Read which ones here.

headline: Apple is hiking the prices of MacBooks and iPads due to the memory chip shortage
summary: Apple has hiked prices on some of its most popular products, including the MacBook and iPad, because of the rising costs of memory and storage chips sparked by the AI boom.

raw.headline: Apple is hiking the prices of MacBooks and iPads due to the memory chip shortage
